title: Chatbot Dialog Flow
scenario: Design a prompt to generate a dialog flow for a chatbot that recommends restaurants based on user preferences. The flow should include conditional statements to ask for user input, process user preferences, and generate recommendations. The output should include the complete dialog flow diagram, with each node and edge labeled. The prompt should be under 200 words and use present tense.
constraints: Must include at least three conditional statements
Must use a consistent naming convention for nodes and edges

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the constraints.
Verify the output dialog flow logic and conditional statements.
Check if the output uses a consistent naming convention.
